creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: To be clear, I would like to commit the gdb_port_ptrace_threads.patch soon.  I plan to upstream the new thread target for gdb 7.11 if I can make the deadline.  That means we will want to switch to the new target for 7.11 in the next month or two.  The sooner the new target can get wider testing the better.
